description: This is a test class for the MailjetEmailProvider, which likely handles email sending via the Mailjet API. It includes setup, configuration, and unit tests for the email provider's send method.

classes.name: MailjetEmailProviderTest
classes.description: Unit test class for MailjetEmailProvider, testing email sending functionality and error handling.

methods.name: setUp
methods.description: Initializes mocks and the instance of MailjetEmailProvider before each test.

methods.name: send_success
methods.description: Tests successful sending of email, verifying correct HTTP request formation.

methods.name: send_throwsOnMissingCredentials
methods.description: Tests that the send method throws an exception when credentials are missing.
